user.title: Solis MK5 Local
user.description: Choose the TCP port this integration listens on. Point a free Remote Server slot (e.g. Server C) of your Ginlong/Solis stick at your Home Assistant IP with this port, connection type TCP.

error.port_in_use: This port is already in use, choose another one.

abort.already_configured: A listener on this port is already configured.

data.stale_after_minutes: Mark measurements unavailable after this many minutes without data

incompatible_logger.title: Solis logger sends an unrecognised protocol
incompatible_logger.description: Several frames in a row from your Ginlong/Solis stick failed validation. This usually means the connected logger uses a different firmware or hardware revision than this integration was built for, so its data cannot be parsed reliably. Enable debug logging to see the rejected frames as hex dumps in the Home Assistant log.
